input.description: Fix History Server log directory env var

content.text: All three patches applied. Now let me wait for the history server to come up and confirm the jobs complete.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  echo "=== Check $i (${i}x5s) ==="
  kubectl get pod -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server --no-headers 2>&1
  kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a --no-headers 2>&1
  kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b --no-headers 2>&1
  
  HS=$(kubectl get pod -n spark-history -l app=spark-history-server --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}')
  JA=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-a -n spark-team-a --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  JB=$(kubectl get job spark-pi-team-b -n spark-team-b --no-headers 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  
  if [[ "$HS" == "Running" && "$JA" == "1/1" && "$JB" == "1/1" ]]; then
    echo "=== All success conditions met ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll until history server is Running and both jobs complete (up to 2 minutes)

description: Poll until history server is Running and both jobs complete (up to 2 minutes)
